title: Global citizenship and sustainable development education
subtitle: An index from 0 (worst) to 1 (best) measuring the extent to which global citizenship and sustainable development education are mainstreamed into different strands of education: national education policies, student assessment, teacher education, and education curricula.
caption:
Global citizenship and sustainable development education, 2020

An index from 0 (worst) to 1 (best) measuring the extent to which global citizenship and sustainable development education are mainstreamed into different strands of education: national education policies, student assessment, teacher education, and education curricula.

Four countries appear in this horizontal bar chart, each with four bars representing the integration of global citizenship and sustainable development education into national education policies, student assessment, teacher education, and education curricula. The index runs from 0 to 1, with 1 marking the highest level of mainstreaming. Colombia and India both reach the maximum value of 1 for national education policies and student assessment; Colombia’s education curricula score 0.88 and teacher education 0.85, while India’s teacher education stands at 0.95 and education curricula at 0.92. Malawi also records 1 for national education policies and student assessment, with education curricula at 0.91 and teacher education at 0.90. Bulgaria shows lower values across all four strands: teacher education at 0.73, student assessment at 0.71, education curricula at 0.65, and national education policies at 0.56. The indicators are based on self-reporting by countries, with a requirement to provide supporting evidence for responses. Across the four countries, the highest scores cluster in national education policies and student assessment, while teacher education and education curricula more often fall below 1. Bulgaria’s bars are uniformly shorter than those of the other three countries, and its national education policies bar is the lowest among all displayed values.
